home.pageTitle: Connectly - Share ideas, connect with your community
home.pageDescription: Connectly is a social platform for sharing posts, photos, and videos, and staying connected with the people and topics you care about.
home.hero.title: Share ideas. Stay connected.
home.hero.subtitle: Share ideas, connect with others, and stay up to date with your community.
home.features.title: Everything you need to share and stay in the loop
home.features.posts.title: Share posts with rich text and media
home.features.posts.description: Write posts with formatting, links, and code blocks, and attach photos and videos to bring your updates to life.
home.features.privacy.title: Control who sees your posts
home.features.privacy.description: Publish posts publicly, keep them private, or save them as drafts until you're ready to share.
home.features.community.title: Stay close to your community
home.features.community.description: Like and comment on posts, follow activity in real time, and get notified the moment someone interacts with you.
home.explore.title: Learn more about Connectly
home.explore.subtitle: Find out what's new, get answers to common questions, or read more about what Connectly offers.
about.pageDescription: Learn about Connectly, a social platform for sharing posts and staying connected with your community.
about.title: About Connectly
about.intro1: Connectly is a social platform built for sharing ideas, photos, and videos with the people who matter to you.
about.intro2: Whether you want to post publicly for everyone to see or keep updates private for a smaller circle, Connectly gives you the tools to share on your own terms.
about.capabilities.title: What you can do on Connectly
about.capabilities.richText.title: Rich text posts
about.capabilities.richText.description: Format your posts with bold, italics, headings, lists, quotes, links, and code blocks using the built-in editor.
about.capabilities.media.title: Photos and videos
about.capabilities.media.description: Attach photos and videos to your posts to share more than just words.
about.capabilities.privacy.title: Public, private, and drafts
about.capabilities.privacy.description: Publish posts publicly, keep them private, or save drafts to finish and share later.
about.capabilities.social.title: Likes and comments
about.capabilities.social.description: Like posts and join the conversation with comments on anything you see in your feed.
about.capabilities.activity.title: Activity and notifications
about.capabilities.activity.description: Keep track of likes and comments on your posts with a live activity feed and real-time notifications.
about.capabilities.search.title: Search posts and people
about.capabilities.search.description: Find posts and people across Connectly with built-in search.
about.capabilities.personalization.title: Make it yours
about.capabilities.personalization.descr: Switch between light and dark mode, and use Connectly in English, Arabic, French, Chinese, or Filipino.
newsEvents.pageDescription: See what's new on Connectly, including recent product updates and improvements.
newsEvents.title: News & Events
newsEvents.subtitle: A look at recent updates and improvements to Connectly.
newsEvents.item1.title: Bulk post management for admins
newsEvents.item1.body: Admins can now select multiple posts at once to publish, move to draft, or delete them, with date filters and content previews to make moderation faster.
newsEvents.item2.title: Refreshed admin dashboard
newsEvents.item2.body: The admin dashboard now gives a clearer overview of users, admins, and posts, alongside an improved user management experience with account suspension and password resets.
newsEvents.item3.title: Light and dark mode
newsEvents.item3.body: Connectly now supports both light and dark themes. Switch anytime from the navigation bar, and your preference is remembered across visits.
newsEvents.item4.title: Drafts and post visibility
newsEvents.item4.body: Save posts as drafts and finish them later, and choose whether each post is public or private when you're ready to share.
newsEvents.item5.title: Real-time activity and notifications
newsEvents.item5.body: See likes and comments on your posts as they happen with a live activity feed powered by real-time notifications.
newsEvents.item6.title: Search and multi-language support
newsEvents.item6.body: Search for posts and people directly from the navigation bar, and use Connectly in English, Arabic, French, Chinese, or Filipino.
faq.pageDescription: Answers to frequently asked questions about using Connectly.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to common questions about using Connectly.
faq.q1.question: How do I create an account?
faq.q1.answer: Select "Sign up" from the login page and enter your name, email, username, and password to create your account.
faq.q2.question: What's the difference between a public and a private post?
faq.q2.answer: Public posts can be seen by anyone, while private posts are only visible to you. You can choose the visibility for each post when you create or edit it.
faq.q3.question: Can I save a post without publishing it?
faq.q3.answer: Yes. Save your post as a draft to finish it later from your profile, then publish it whenever you're ready.
faq.q4.question: How do I like or comment on a post?
faq.q4.answer: Open any post in your feed to like it or add a comment. You can also edit or delete your own comments at any time.
faq.q5.question: Will I be notified when someone interacts with my posts?
faq.q5.answer: Yes. Likes and comments on your posts appear in your activity feed in real time, along with a notification badge.
faq.q6.question: Can I change the language of the app?
faq.q6.answer: Yes. Use the language switcher in the navigation bar to choose between English, Arabic, French, Chinese, and Filipino.
faq.q7.question: Does Connectly support dark mode?
faq.q7.answer: Yes. Toggle between light and dark mode from the navigation bar, and your preference will be remembered the next time you visit.
faq.q8.question: How is content moderated on Connectly?
faq.q8.answer: Connectly's administrators can review, manage, and remove posts that violate community guidelines to help keep the platform safe.
